name: globalbusan-monorepo
description: Global Busan XYZ Investment Platform - Monorepo

scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend-admin && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" --names "frontend,backend,admin" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:frontend && npm run deploy:admin
scripts.clean: cd frontend && rmdir /s /q node_modules dist 2>nul & cd ../backend && rmdir /s /q node_modules 2>nul & cd ../frontend-admin && rmdir /s /q node_modules dist 2>nul

author: Global Busan Team
